name: zip-format
description: ZIP file builder with DEFLATE compression - creates valid ZIP archives for PPTX/DOCX/XLSX/EPUB
author: system

hints.overview: Assembles arrays of {name, data} entries into valid ZIP files.
criticalRules: Returns Uint8Array — write with writeFileBinary, not writeFile
commonPatterns: For PPTX: pres.build() returns entries → createZip(entries) or use exportToFile()
